name: Cheesy Cream of Mushroom Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cheddar cheese, shredded or grated
1 can (14 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Place a single layer of biscuits evenly in the prepared baking pan.
2. Sprinkle shredded or grated cheddar cheese over the biscuits.
3. Open the can of cream of mushroom soup and pour about half into a mixing bowl. Add an equal amount of water, stirring until well combined.
4. Pour the mixed soup and water over the biscuits and cheese.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for approximately 25 minutes or until the biscuits have risen above the soup and are lightly browned on top.
You can substitute cream of chicken soup instead.
